case_title: PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY VS. ROSEMARIE MANNO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANNO, ROSEMARIE AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 355 SERRANO DRIVE 9-M, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132 , LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $99.16 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MANNO, ROSEMARIE AN INDIVIDUAL 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MANNO, ROSEMARIE AN INDIVIDUAL
